description: Execute immediate actions for 2026-03-11: 1) Run scout.py to collect fresh competitor data. 2) Run full pipeline (Scout → Strategist → Creator EN) to generate today's content plan. 3) Run outbound engagement for EN account via publisher.py smart-outbound (use latest outbound plan, or generate one). 4) Run analyst.py collect to gather metrics on all previously posted content. 5) Send results summary to operator via Telegram. Focus on DOING, not planning. Execute all scripts directly. Date: 2026-03-11. Only EN account (JP suspended).
notes: Operator is frustrated with too much planning and strategy — wants pure execution and action. Run everything directly, no strategy reviews or meeting documents. Incorporate article insights into strategy naturally (short captions, outbound quality, content volume) but don't make a separate review document. Just execute the pipeline and outbound. Send concise Telegram updates on what was done.
